name: Majestic Command
components: V, S
description: You speak a word of tactical authority backed by your draconic heritage. The target must pass a Wisdom saving throw (DC 13) or be temporarily pacified, regarding you and your allies as non-hostile for the duration. The target will not attack or take harmful actions against you, though it may defend itself if attacked. This is a Strider-Garrison maneuver — it works best when delivered with the confidence of command.
higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the DC increases by 1 for each slot level above 1st. At 3rd level, you may target one additional creature within range.

name: Calibrated Burst
components: S
description: You snap your fingers, flash-igniting the space around a target you can see. Make a ranged spell attack using Dexterity + Proficiency bonus to hit. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Fire damage. The ignition is brief but intense, producing a sharp flash of light and heat. This spell was developed by Strider-Garrison scouts who needed a silent, somatic-only offensive option that wouldn't give away their position with verbal components.
higher_levels: At 5th level, the damage increases to 2d10. At 11th level, 3d10. At 17th level, 4d10.

name: Draconic Retribution
components: V
description: You channel your Blood Purity into your weapon. For the duration, your melee weapon attacks deal an additional 1d4 damage of your draconic element (fire, lightning, cold, acid, or necrotic — chosen at time of casting based on your bloodline). This is the signature combat spell of the Church of the Five Skulls' Inquisitors. Every ordained Inquisitor learns this before any other spell.
higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level, the bonus damage increases to 1d6. At 4th level, 1d8. At 6th level, 1d10.

name: Aetheric Backlash
casting_time: 1 Reaction (taken when you are hit by a spell or melee attack)
components: S
description: Your unstable blood lashes out at an attacker. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 damage of a type matching your draconic element. Additionally, if the triggering attack was a spell, the caster must make a Spell Safety check (Constitution saving throw) with disadvantage as your Aetheric interference destabilizes their casting. This spell is innate to Ash-Walkers, whose unstable blood makes them living weapons against other casters.
higher_levels: When cast at 2nd level or higher, damage increases by 1d10 per slot level above 1st.

name: Purity Sight
components: V, S, M (a fragment of Blood Crystal worth 10 GC)
description: Your eyes take on the crimson glow of a Blood Crystal. For the duration, you can see the exact Blood Purity percentage of any creature you look at, displayed as a glowing number visible only to you above their head. You also learn their dragon classification (Blank, Common, Lesser Blood, Archon, Scion, Sovereign). Creatures with 95%+ purity appear as 0% unless they have voluntarily revealed their true nature to you. This spell is restricted — possession of the material component without Church authorization is a crime in Obsidian territories.
higher_levels: At 4th level, the duration increases to 1 hour and you can detect magically altered or forged purity readings. At 6th level, you can also sense a creature's House affiliation and whether they have cast a spell in the last 24 hours.
classes: Ordained (Cleric, Paladin - Inquisitor), Archon Caster (Wizard - Divination)

name: Soul-Meld Beacon
components: V, S, M (two living creatures, one Pristine Aether-Core worth 1,000 GC)
description: You attempt the forbidden soul-meld ritual — fusing two living souls into a single vessel. Both subjects must be willing or incapacitated. Each subject makes a DC 20 Charisma saving throw. If both succeed, their souls merge into a new entity with Blood Purity equal to the average of both subjects. If only one succeeds, that soul dominates; the other is consumed. If both fail, both subjects die and the caster takes 10d10 necrotic damage from the backlash. The resulting entity is a Scion (90-94% purity). This ritual is the highest heresy in the Church of the Five Skulls. Performing it is punishable by eternal Inquisitorial Smite — no trial, no appeal, no mercy.
higher_levels: At 7th level, the resulting Scion may achieve 95%+ purity (Sovereign-class). At 9th level, the caster may attempt to merge their own soul with a subject. The caster makes the Charisma save with disadvantage.
classes: Penitent (Warlock - Cult of the Sixth), Archon Caster (Wizard - Necromancy, forbidden)

name: Void-Ward Grasp
components: V, S
description: Your hand wreathes in null-light. Make a melee spell attack. On hit, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage and cannot regain hit points until the start of your next turn. The spell's damage increases by 1d8 at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels.

name: Blood-Drop Spark
components: V, S, M (a drop of blood)
description: You fling a bead of vitriolic blood. Make a ranged spell attack. On hit, the target takes 1d6 fire damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take an additional 1d6 acid damage at the start of your next turn. The initial damage increases by 1d6 at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels.

name: Inquisition's Gaze
components: V, S
description: Your eyes glow with pale gold light. For the duration, you gain darkvision out to 60 feet, and you can see any magical auras within that range as faint outlines. You have advantage on Insight checks against creatures you can see.

name: Thief's Quiet
components: V, S
description: You draw a shroud of silent void around yourself. For the duration, you make no sound from your movements—footsteps, rustling armor, or opening doors. You have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks. The effect ends if you attack or cast a spell.

name: Scarlet Lash
components: V, S
description: Your blood coalesces into a whip of crimson energy. For the duration, you can make a melee spell attack as an action, dealing 2d6 necrotic damage on a hit. You regain hit points equal to half the damage dealt. The whip disappears if you let go of it.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Null-Flame Bolt
components: V, S, M (a shard of obsidian)
description: You hurl a bolt of void-touched fire. Make a ranged spell attack. On hit, the target takes 2d6 fire damage and 1d6 necrotic damage. If the target is a construct or undead, the necrotic damage becomes 2d6 instead.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The fire damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Aether Stitch
components: V, S, M (a threaded needle worth 1 gp)
description: You weave a strand of aether through a wound or tear. One creature you touch regains 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier hit points. Alternatively, you can repair a nonmagical object up to 1 foot in any dimension, restoring all tears or breaks.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Dragon's Whisper
components: V, S
description: You speak a single word of Draconic command. One creature that can hear you must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you. While charmed, it regards you as a trusted ally. The effect ends if you or your allies attack it.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.

name: Inquisition's Brand
components: V, S, M (a silver holy symbol)
description: You sear a glowing symbol onto a willing creature's skin. For the duration, the brand sheds dim light in a 5-foot radius. Once before the spell ends, when the branded creature is targeted by a spell from an enemy, it can use its reaction to gain resistance to that spell's damage.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The brand grants resistance to one additional spell per slot level above 1st (maximum 3 uses).

name: Blood Pact
components: V, S, M (a silver dagger worth 50 gp)
description: You draw blood from yourself and a willing creature, linking your life forces. For the next 24 hours, when one of you takes damage, the other can use a reaction to reduce that damage by half, suffering the reduced amount themselves. The pact ends if you are both reduced to 0 hit points.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The duration extends by 24 hours for each slot level above 1st.

name: Void Step
components: V, S
description: You step into a rift of void and reappear in an unoccupied space you can see within 30 feet. After teleporting, you become invisible until the start of your next turn. You cannot use this spell again until you finish a short rest.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The range increases by 10 feet for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Aether Cage
components: V, S, M (a shard of crystal)
description: You create a shimmering cage of aether around a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained for the duration. While restrained, it takes 1d6 force damage at the start of each of its turns. At the end of each of its turns, it can repeat the save.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. You can target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Core-Thief's Scouring
components: V, S, M (a piece of rusted metal)
description: Your hand glows with fey-stealing energy. Make a melee spell attack against a creature. On hit, the target takes 4d6 psychic damage, and you learn one of its damage resistances or immunities (your choice). The target cannot regain hit points from any source until the end of its next turn.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Dragonfire Breath
components: V, S, M (a scale from a dragon)
description: You exhale a blast of draconic flame. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6 fire damage on a failure, or half as much on a success. The fire ignites unattended flammable objects.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Blank's Resilience
casting_time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or a creature within 30 feet fails a saving throw
components: V, S
description: You channel the null-mind of the Blank. The triggering creature rerolls the failed saving throw and gains a bonus to the roll equal to your spellcasting ability modifier (minimum +1). It must use the new roll.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. You can target one additional creature within range for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Sanguine Storm
components: V, S, M (a vial of blood)
description: A crimson mist erupts from you, filling a 30-foot radius. All creatures in the area must make a Constitution saving throw at the start of your turn, taking 3d6 necrotic damage on a failure, or half on success. You regain hit points equal to half the total damage dealt each turn.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Void Rift
components: V, S, M (a cracked mirror)
description: You tear open a rift to the Void at a point you can see. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6 force damage and 2d6 necrotic damage on a failure, or half on a success. The rift pulls any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of its center 10 feet toward it (no save).
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The force damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Inquisition's Pyre
components: V, S, M (a pinch of ash)
description: A pillar of golden-white flame erupts from a creature you designate. The target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 6d8 fire damage on a failure, or half on a success. If the target is a fiend, undead, or shapechanger, it takes an additional 4d8 radiant damage.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The fire damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Aether Pulse
components: V, S, M (a crystal rod worth 100 gp)
description: You release a pulse of raw aether in a 60-foot-long, 5-foot-wide line. Each creature in that line must make a Strength saving throw, taking 8d6 force damage on a failure, or half on a success. Creatures of Large size or smaller are pushed 15 feet away from you on a failed save.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The damage increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Blood Dominion
components: V, S, M (a drop of your own blood)
description: You seize control of a creature's blood. One target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target is incapacitated and takes 4d6 necrotic damage at the start of each of your turns. On each of its turns, it can repeat the save to break free. You can use a bonus action to force the target to move up to half its speed in a direction of your choice.
higher_levels: At Higher Levels. The necrotic damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Aether Missile
components: V, S
description: You launch a bolt of pale aether energy at a target. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 force damage. This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th (2d8), 11th (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Void Shield
casting_time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you are hit by an attack
components: V, S
description: A shimmering void of absolute darkness interposes itself between you and the attack. You gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from that attack until the start of your next turn.

name: Blood Sacrifice
components: V, S, M (a ceremonial dagger stained with blood)
description: You cut yourself, taking 2d6 necrotic damage. Choose one spell you have prepared of 1st level or lower. You regain one expended spell slot of that spell's level. The damage cannot be reduced in any way.

name: Dragon's Breath
components: V, S, M (a scale from a dragon)
description: You exhale a torrent of elemental energy. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 6d6 damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. Choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison when you cast this spell.

name: Inquisitor's Verdict
components: V, S
description: You pronounce judgment upon a target you can see. It must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it takes 8d8 radiant damage and is stunned until the end of your next turn. If it is a fiend or undead, it takes 12d8 radiant damage instead.

name: Cult Prophecy
components: V, S, M (a bloodstained parchment)
description: You scry the skeins of fate for a dark omen. When you complete the casting, you gain a vision of one future event within the next 8 hours. The DM chooses a single clue (a phrase, image, or name) that will become relevant, but not the specifics of the event.

name: Flesh Graft
components: V, S, M (a piece of flesh from a creature of the same type as the target)
description: You graft a piece of flesh onto an allied creature you touch. The target gains 20 temporary hit points and, while the spell lasts, can use a bonus action to make one unarmed strike that deals 1d6 + Strength modifier necrotic damage.

name: Storm Cloak
components: V, S, M (a scrap of a storm giant's cloak)
description: A howling vortex of wind and lightning wraps around you. You gain a flying speed of 40 feet. Any creature that hits you with a melee attack takes 2d8 lightning damage. Once per turn, you can launch a bolt of lightning at a target within 60 feet, dealing 3d8 lightning damage on a hit (ranged spell attack).

name: Iron Skin
components: V, S, M (a handful of iron filings)
description: Your skin hardens and turns metallic. You gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage. Additionally, your unarmed strikes deal 1d4 + Strength modifier bludgeoning damage.

name: Pyre Forge
components: V, S, M (a lump of charcoal)
description: A 20-foot-radius sphere of infernal flames erupts at a point within range. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. The flames linger for the duration, and any creature that enters the area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there takes 4d6 fire damage. The ground in the area becomes difficult terrain.

name: Sump Mist
components: V, S, M (a vial of swamp water)
description: A thick, fetid mist fills a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within range. The area is heavily obscured. Creatures that start their turn in the mist must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of their next turn.

name: Ash Storm
components: V, S, M (a handful of ashes)
description: A swirling storm of hot ash and cinders fills a 40-foot-radius cylinder, 20 feet high, centered on a point within range. The area is heavily obscured. Creatures that start their turn in the area take 2d6 fire damage and must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have their speed halved until the end of their next turn.

name: Drake's Blood
components: V, S
description: You infuse your veins with draconic vitality. You gain temporary hit points equal to 1d10 + your spellcasting modifier. Additionally, for the duration, you have resistance to a damage type of your choice: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison.

name: Bone Cage
components: V, S, M (a fragment of a skeleton)
description: Razor-sharp bones erupt from the ground in a 10-foot-radius circle around a point you choose. The area becomes difficult terrain. A creature in the area when it appears must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d12 piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. A creature that enters the area for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there takes 4d12 piercing damage. The bones form a wall that provides half cover.

name: Crystal Lance
components: V, S, M (a shard of crystal)
description: A lance of shimmering crystal shoots from your hand in a line 120 feet long and 5 feet wide. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d8 piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. On a failure, the creature is impaled and restrained until the end of your next turn.

name: Sovereigns Wrath
components: V, S, M (a shattered crown)
description: You unleash a blast of divine retribution. All creatures of your choice in a 30-foot radius must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, they take 8d8 radiant damage and are stunned until the end of your next turn. On a success, they take half damage and are not stunned. Undead and fiends have disadvantage on the save.

name: Tenebris Corruption
components: V, S, M (a vial of shadow essence)
description: A target creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it becomes corrupted, taking 4d10 necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns and gaining vulnerability to necrotic damage. It can repeat the save at the end of each turn, ending the effect on a success.

name: Ferrum Stand
components: V, S
description: You become an immovable bulwark. You gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage, and your speed is halved. When a creature within 5 feet hits you with a melee attack, you can use your reaction to force it to make a Strength saving throw. On a failure, it is knocked prone.

name: Vortex Tornado
components: V, S, M (a small whirlwind of dust)
description: A 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder of swirling wind forms at a point you choose. Creatures in the area must make a Strength saving throw. On a failure, they take 6d6 bludgeoning damage and are restrained. On a success, half damage and are not restrained. The vortex moves 20 feet per turn on your command, dragging restrained creatures.

name: Obsidian Gavel
components: V, S, M (a black marble gavel)
description: A massive obsidian hammer slams down on a point you can see. Each creature in a 15-foot-radius, 30-foot-tall cylinder must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, they take 10d10 bludgeoning damage and are knocked prone. On a success, they take half damage and are not knocked prone. Structures take double damage.

name: Ignis Inferno
components: V, S, M (a pinch of sulfur and brimstone)
description: A searing blast of hellfire erupts in a 40-foot-radius sphere. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, they take 10d8 fire damage and are set ablaze, taking 2d8 fire damage at the start of each of their turns until they use an action to douse the flames. On a success, half damage and not ablaze.

name: Core Explosion
components: V, S, M (a shard of obsidian)
description: You trigger a cataclysmic blast of gravity and fire from your core. All creatures and objects in a 60-foot radius must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, they take 12d10 force damage and are knocked prone. On a success, half damage. The spell destroys unattended objects and structures.

name: Aetheric Flood
components: V, S, M (a vial of liquid starlight)
description: A wave of shimmering aether sweeps across a 30-foot-radius sphere. Creatures in the area must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, they take 8d10 radiant damage and are blinded until the end of your next turn. On a success, half damage. The area becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute as reality ripples.

name: Blanks Fury
components: V
description: You unleash a psychic scream of pure nihilism. Creatures in a 30-foot cone must make an Intelligence saving throw. On a failure, they take 6d8 psychic damage and become stunned until the end of your next turn. On a success, half damage and not stunned. Creatures with an Intelligence score of 3 or lower are immune.

name: Penitents Gambit
casting_time: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage
components: V, S
description: You channel the pain into a retributive aura. Until the start of your next turn, any creature that hits you with a melee attack takes 3d8 necrotic damage, and you regain hit points equal to half the damage dealt. This effect can trigger multiple times.

name: Void Walk
components: V, S
description: You step into the void and reappear in a space you can see within 120 feet. When you vanish, each creature within 10 feet of your starting location must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failure, they take 6d8 cold damage and are frightened until the end of your next turn. On a success, half damage.

name: Cycle Break
components: V, S, M (a shattered hourglass)
description: You target a creature you can see. It must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it loses any immunity to damage or conditions, and any ongoing magical effects on it (such as haste or invisibility) end. For 1 minute, it cannot gain temporary hit points or advantage on saving throws.

name: Crown Shatter
components: V, S, M (a broken crown)
description: You strike at the will of a target creature. It must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failure, it takes 6d10 psychic damage and suffers a random form of short-term madness (DMG table). On a success, half damage and no madness. If the target has legendary resistances, it must expend one or the spell pierces.

name: Sleeper Rise
components: V, S, M (a handful of grave dirt)
description: You animate the dead in a 30-foot-radius area. Up to five corpses or skeletons rise as zombies or skeletons under your control for 1 hour. They obey your verbal commands, and their maximum hit points are doubled. They crumble to dust after the duration.

name: Maw Open
components: V, S, M (a tooth of a great predator)
description: A 40-foot-deep, 20-foot-diameter maw of shadow opens in the ground. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, they take 8d10 piercing damage and are grappled at the maw's bottom. On a success, half damage and they escape to the edge. Grappled creatures take 4d10 necrotic damage at the start of your turns.

name: Void-Touch
components: S, M (a sliver of obsidian)
description: Make a melee spell attack against a creature. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage and cannot regain hit points until the start of your next turn. This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: Dragon-Spark
components: V, S
description: A mote of primordial draconic fire streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage. On a critical hit, the target ignites, taking 1d4 fire damage at the start of each of its turns until it uses an action to douse the flames. This spell's damage increases by 1d10 at 5th (2d10), 11th (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).

name: Flesh-Knit
components: V, S
description: Tendrils of gristly flesh reweave wounds. One creature you touch regains hit points equal to 1d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs. This spell's healing increases by 1d6 at 5th (2d6), 11th (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Blood-Read
components: S, M (a drop of the target's blood)
description: You taste a creature's blood and glimpse its secrets. Choose one of the following: you learn the target's current hit points and any conditions afflicting it; or you learn its deepest fear (useful for intimidation); or you learn one damage resistance or vulnerability it possesses. The target must be willing or incapacitated.

name: Storm-Snap
components: V, S
description: You snap your fingers, releasing a crackling line of lightning. Each creature in a 30-foot long, 5-foot wide line must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 lightning damage. This spell's damage increases by 1d6 at 5th (2d6), 11th (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: Aether-Ward
casting_time: 1 reaction, which you take when you or a creature within 30 feet takes damage
components: V, S
description: You weave thin aetheric strands around the target, reducing the triggering damage by 2d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier. If this reduces the damage to 0, the ward flares and grants the target temporary hit points equal to the amount prevented.

name: Sovereigns-Presence
components: V, S, M (a fragment of a fallen monarch's crown)
description: You exude an aura of dread authority. Hostile creatures within 20 feet must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, they have disadvantage on attack rolls against you and cannot take reactions. On a success, they are immune for 24 hours.

name: Inquisitors-Chains
components: V, S, M (a rusted iron link)
description: Phantom chains erupt from the ground to restrain a creature you can see. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained for the duration. A restrained creature takes 1d6 psychic damage at the start of each of its turns. The chains are immune to all damage but can be destroyed by a successful DC 15 Strength check.

name: Cultists-Secret
components: V, S, M (a bloodstained parchment)
description: You scry the forbidden lore hidden in a cult's rites. Choose one creature type (aberration, fiend, undead) or a specific cult you can name. You learn one vulnerability, resistance, or immunity common among them, or the general location of their nearest hidden sanctum.

name: Ferrum-Plate
components: V, S, M (a strip of hammered iron)
description: The touched creature's skin hardens into dark, metallic iron. For the duration, the target gains a +2 bonus to AC. Additionally, when a creature hits the target with a melee attack, the attacker takes 1d6 piercing damage from the jagged metal.

name: Ignis-Cataclysm
components: V, S, M (a pinch of sulfur and a ruby worth 500 gp)
description: A pillar of black-and-crimson fire erupts in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, they take 10d6 fire damage and are blinded until the end of your next turn. On a success, they take half damage and are not blinded.

name: Vortex-Rift
components: V, S, M (a shard of obsidian from the Void)
description: You tear a rift to the Void at a point you can see. The rift is a 20-foot-radius sphere of absolute darkness. It heavily obscures vision and extinguishes nonmagical light. Any creature that starts its turn in the rift takes 4d10 necrotic damage. A creature that enters the rift for the first time on a turn must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pulled 10 feet toward its center.

name: Obsidian-Decree
components: V, S, M (a polished obsidian slab)
description: You speak a decree of absolute finality. One creature you can see must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it takes 8d8 necrotic damage and is cursed: if it dies within the next minute, its soul is trapped in the obsidian slab, preventing resurrection. On a success, it takes half damage and is not cursed.

name: Tenebris-Undo
components: V, S, M (a black diamond worth 1,000 gp)
description: You unravel a single magical effect within 60 feet of you. Choose one spell of 5th level or lower, or one curse, or one planar binding effect. It is dispelled or suppressed for 1 minute. If the effect is a spell of 6th level or higher, make a spellcasting ability check with a DC of 12 + the spell's level. On a success, it is suppressed for 1 round.

name: Flesh-Tide
components: V, S, M (a handful of raw flesh)
description: A wave of sentient, living flesh erupts from you in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a Strength saving throw. On a failure, they take 8d8 bludgeoning damage and are knocked prone. Additionally, they must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of their next turn as the flesh tries to merge with them.

name: Dragons-Awakening
components: V, S, M (a scale from an ancient dragon, worth 5,000 gp)
description: You touch a willing creature, awakening the slumbering dragon within. The target gains a +2 bonus to AC and immunity to fire damage. Additionally, once per turn when it hits with a melee attack, it can deal an extra 4d8 fire damage. Finally, the target can use an action to exhale a 60-foot cone of fire, dealing 12d8 fire damage (Dexterity save for half).

name: Crown-Shatter
components: V, S, M (a shard of a shattered crown)
description: You target a creature you can see. That creature must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, its mind shatters under the weight of authority. The target is stunned for 1 minute. At the end of each of its turns, it can repeat the saving throw. On a success, it takes 8d8 psychic damage instead. Creatures with legendary actions have advantage on the saving throw.

name: Void-Apocalypse
components: V, S, M (an obsidian orb worth 25,000 gp, which the spell consumes)
description: You tear open a permanent rift to the Void at a point you can see. The rift is a 100-foot-radius sphere of absolute darkness and silence. The area becomes a dead magic zone (no spells or magical effects can function). Creatures inside the rift when it opens must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failure, they are annihilated (reduced to 0 hit points and cannot be resurrected except by a wish spell). On a success, they take 20d10 necrotic damage and are blinded permanently. The rift remains for 1d4 days before collapsing.

name: Blood-Crystal-Locate
components: V
S
M (a drop of blood from a creature you have seen, which is consumed)
description: You touch a blood-smeared crystal shard and whisper the name of a creature whose blood you possess. For the duration, you know the direction to that creature if it is on the same plane of existence. If the creature is dead or shielded by a 3rd-level or higher abjuration spell, the crystal remains dark and you learn nothing.
higher_levels: When cast at 3rd level or higher, the duration increases by 1 hour for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Purify-Aether
components: V
S
M (a pinch of salt and a vial of distilled water)
description: You draw the tainted aether from a 20-foot-radius sphere within range. All nonmagical poisons, diseases, and corrupt vapors (including thick smoke or miasma) are neutralized. Magical corruption (such as from a 2nd-level or lower necromancy spell) is dispelled. This spell cannot remove curses or demonic taint.

name: Forge-Heat
components: V
S
M (a metal tool or weapon)
description: You touch a ferrous metal object no larger than a longsword. It glows with a dull red heat, shedding dim light in a 5-foot radius. For the duration, the object is hot enough to ignite dry wood and deals 1d4 fire damage on a melee hit, but cannot melt or deform. You can end the spell early by pressing the object into water or snow.

name: Storm-Sense
components: V
S
M (a copper wire and a glass bead)
description: You attune your senses to the pressure and static of the air. For the duration, you know the exact distance and direction to any storm (rain, snow, sandstorm, or magical tempest) within 10 miles, and you can predict its arrival within the next hour to the nearest minute. You also gain advantage on Survival checks to navigate during foul weather.

name: Flesh-Recall
components: V
S
M (a preserved piece of flesh from a willing creature)
description: You touch a willing creature and merge a small sample of its flesh (taken beforehand) into your own. Until you cast this spell again, you can as an action recall that creature from any location on the same plane to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of you, provided you both consent. The recalled creature arrives with all its possessions and is disoriented for 1 round (can act but has disadvantage on attacks).

name: Iron-Anchor
components: V
S
M (a small iron ingot)
description: You designate a point on the ground within range. A 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-tall cylinder of shimmering iron energy appears. Creatures in the area have their speed halved and cannot be teleported or involuntarily moved except by magical means of 4th level or higher. The anchor persists even if the ingot is destroyed.

name: Shadow-Pass
components: V
S
M (a piece of obsidian and a drop of ink)
description: You step into a shadow you can see within 5 feet and emerge from a shadow within 120 feet of your starting point. The target shadow must be large enough to cover your body (at least 5 feet across). If no such shadow exists at the destination, the spell fails. You can bring one willing creature of your size or smaller with you.

name: Ash-Breath
components: V
S
M (a pinch of ash from a funeral pyre)
description: Your mouth fills with fine ash. For the duration, you can exhale a cloud of ashen dust in a 15-foot cone once per round as a bonus action. Creatures in the cone must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of your next turn. The dust also extinguishes nonmagical flames of Small size or smaller.

name: Sump-Breathe
components: V
S
M (a gill from a fish and a clean rag)
description: You touch a willing creature and alter its lungs to breathe foul water or thick sludge. For the duration, the creature can breathe in any liquid that is not acidic or magical poison, ignoring any noxious vapors dissolved in the liquid. It retains normal breathing ability as well.

name: Scale-Armor
components: V
S
M (a scale from a lizard or dragon)
description: You touch a willing creature and its skin becomes covered in thin, overlapping scales. The creature's AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier (if unarmored) or gains a +1 bonus to AC if already wearing armor. The scales shed water and grant advantage on saving throws against effects that would cause the creature to be grappled or restrained.

name: Bone-Mend
components: V
S
M (a piece of bone from a humanoid, which is consumed)
description: You touch a broken bone or shattered skeleton and channel necromantic energy to knit the fractures. If the target is a creature, it regains 2d8 hit points and one broken limb is fully healed. If the target is an undead or a corpse, it regains 2d6 hit points (if a creature with hit points) or is stabilized if it has the 'broken' condition.

name: Drake-Speed
components: V
S
M (a scale from a dragon or drake)
description: You touch a willing creature and infuse it with dragon-like swiftness. For the duration, the creature's speed increases by 20 feet, it gains a climbing speed equal to its walking speed, and it does not provoke opportunity attacks when it moves. Additionally, the creature can take the Dash action as a bonus action.

name: Crystal-Sight
components: V
S
M (a crystal lens worth at least 50 gp)
description: You peer through a polished crystal and gain the ability to see invisible creatures and objects within 60 feet. You also see the faint magical auras of enchantments and illusions, though you do not learn their school. This sight does not penetrate solid objects.

name: Void-Whisper
components: V
S
M (a shard of obsidian and a drop of your blood)
description: You whisper a secret message into a willing creature's mind. The message is no longer than 25 words. The creature can recall the message perfectly at any time but cannot be forced to reveal it by magical or mundane means (including truth spells) for the duration. If the creature tries to repeat the message, its voice becomes a voiceless whisper that only the intended recipient can hear.

name: Crown-Oath
components: V
S
M (a circlet of gold and iron worth at least 500 gp, which is consumed)
description: You designate up to six willing creatures within range and bind them with a solemn oath. For the duration, if any oath-bound creature breaks a specified rule you declare (such as 'never harm an innocent' or 'always obey the crown'), it suffers a curse: it gains one level of exhaustion that can only be removed by a greater restoration or by completing a quest to atone. The oath can be a single sentence of up to 10 words. This spell cannot be cast again on the same creature until the previous oath is fulfilled.

name: Ignis-Strike
components: V, S
description: A bolt of sickly orange flame erupts from your hand. Make a ranged spell attack against a target. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 fire damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of your next turn as ash clings to their eyes.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Vortex-Bolt
components: V, S, M (a tiny whirlpool of ink)
description: You hurl a spiraling bolt of compressed void-stuff. Make a ranged spell attack against a target. On a hit, the target takes 3d6 force damage and is pulled 10 feet toward you. If the target is Large or larger, it has advantage on the saving throw to resist the pull.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Obsidian-Shard
components: V, S
description: You create a razor-sharp shard of volcanic glass that tears through foes. Each creature in a 30-foot long, 5-foot wide line must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 3d10 slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. The ground in the line becomes difficult terrain until the start of your next turn.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Tenebris-Grasp
components: V, S, M (a dried spider leg)
description: Shadowy tendrils erupt from the ground and clutch at a creature you can see. The target must make a Strength saving throw. On a failure, it takes 4d8 necrotic damage and is restrained until the end of your next turn. On a success, it takes half damage and is not restrained. While restrained, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the initial damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Ferrum-Bash
components: V, S
description: Your arm or weapon becomes reinforced with jagged iron. The next time you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack before the spell ends, the attack deals an extra 2d6 bludgeoning damage and the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the extra damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Pyre-Blast
components: V, S, M (a pinch of sulfur and a drop of blood)
description: A burst of greasy, clinging flame expands from you. Each creature of your choice within 20 feet must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 6d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. Creatures that fail the save are also set on fire, taking 1d4 fire damage at the start of each of their turns until they use an action to extinguish the flames.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the initial damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Void-Lance
components: V, S, M (a sliver of obsidian)
description: You conjure a lance of pure negation from the void. Make a ranged spell attack against a target. On a hit, the target takes 7d8 force damage and its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Flesh-Whip
components: V, S, M (a strip of cured leather)
description: A tendril of animated muscle and sinew lashes out from your hand. Make a melee spell attack against a target within range. On a hit, the target takes 3d6 slashing damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of your next turn as necrotic energy seeps into the wound.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Storm-Chain
components: V, S, M (a link of rusted iron chain)
description: A crackling chain of sickly green lightning arcs from you to a point you can see within range. Each creature in a 60-foot long, 5-foot wide line must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 8d6 lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. Creatures wearing metal armor have disadvantage on this saving throw.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th.

name: Crystal-Burst
components: V, S, M (a handful of broken glass)
description: A cluster of jagged crystals explodes outward from a point you choose. Each creature in a 15-foot radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 5d8 piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. Shards of crystal litter the area, making it difficult terrain until cleared.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Ash-Scatter
components: V, S, M (a pinch of ash from a funeral pyre)
description: A cloud of hot, choking ash erupts from your hands. Each creature in a 30-foot cone must make a Constitution saving throw. A creature takes 4d8 fire damage and is blinded until the end of your next turn on a failed save, or half as much damage and not blinded on a successful one.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: Bone-Spear
components: V, S, M (a splinter of bone)
description: You conjure a spear of jagged bone and hurl it at a creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 piercing damage. If the target is a creature of flesh and blood, the spear leaves a wound that bleeds profusely, and the target takes 1d4 necrotic damage at the start of its next turn.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the initial damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

name: Sovereigns-Fury
components: V, S, M (a crown of black iron worth 500 gp, which the spell consumes)
description: You unleash the wrath of a forgotten tyrant. Each creature of your choice within 60 feet must make a Constitution saving throw. A creature takes 12d8 fire damage and 4d8 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much of each on a successful one. Creatures that fail the save are also frightened for 1 minute. They can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the effect on a success.

name: Inquisitors-Smite
components: V, S
description: Your weapon glows with a pale, judgmental light. The next time you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack during the spell's duration, the attack deals an extra 6d8 radiant damage. Additionally, the target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed until the end of your next turn, as they are wracked with guilt and pain.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the extra damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: Cultists-Venom
components: V, S, M (a vial of black bile)
description: You shoot a stream of corrosive venom at a target. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 3d6 acid damage and must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it is poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned this way, the target takes 1d6 poison damage at the start of each of its turns. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success.
at_higher_levels: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the initial acid damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: Aether-Shell
components: V, S, M (a shard of translucent crystal)
description: A shimmering shell of aetheric energy envelops a willing creature you touch. For the duration, the target gains resistance to force damage and has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects that would banish, teleport, or forcibly move it. Additionally, the shell sheds dim light in a 5-foot radius.

name: Blood-Barrier
components: V, S, M (a drop of the caster's blood)
description: You sacrifice a portion of your vitality to create a defensive barrier. When you cast this spell, you take 2d6 necrotic damage which cannot be reduced. For the duration, you and up to 5 friendly creatures within range gain temporary hit points equal to 2d10 + your spellcasting ability modifier. Each time a protected creature is hit by an attack, the barrier flashes crimson, and the attacker must make a Constitution saving throw or take 1d8 necrotic damage (once per round per attacker).

name: Dragons-Scale
components: V, S, M (a scale from a true dragon)
description: You touch a willing creature and cause shimmering draconic scales to grow across its skin. The target's AC becomes 18 (if its natural AC is lower) and gains resistance to one damage type of your choice: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison. Additionally, the target can use its reaction to add +2 to a saving throw against a breath weapon or similar area effect that deals that damage type.

name: Inquisitors-Bulwark
components: V, S, M (a holy symbol or badge of office)
description: You create a glowing barrier of divine judgment that expands outward from you. The area becomes difficult terrain for hostile creatures. When a hostile creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it takes 3d8 radiant damage and cannot benefit from invisibility, shapeshifting, or illusions while inside the barrier. Allies within the barrier gain a +2 bonus to AC.

name: Flesh-Knit-Greater
components: V, S, M (a roll of bandages and a vial of holy water)
description: You channel potent regenerative energy into a wounded creature you touch. The target regains 4d8 + 10 hit points. If the target has any severed body parts (fingers, toes, limbs), the spell reattaches them instantly. This spell also ends one effect causing ongoing damage, such as a sword of wounding or a similar magical bleeding effect.

name: Storm-Wall
components: V, S, M (a small lightning rod)
description: You conjure a wall of churning storm energy. Choose a line 60 feet long and 10 feet high, or a circle 20 feet in diameter and 10 feet high. The wall provides half cover to creatures behind it. Any creature that passes through the wall must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 6d8 lightning damage on a failed save, or half on a success. The wall also deflects ranged spell attacks: any ranged spell attack that targets a creature behind the wall has disadvantage.

name: Iron-Skin
components: V, S, M (a pinch of iron filings)
description: You transform the flesh of a willing creature into living iron. The target gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. Additionally, the target’s AC becomes 20 (if its natural AC is lower) and it has advantage on saving throws against being poisoned, paralyzed, or stunned. The target’s speed is reduced by 10 feet, and it has disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

name: Crystal-Cage
components: V, S, M (a small piece of quartz)
description: You trap a creature of your choice within a shimmering crystalline prison. The target must make a Dexterity saving throw or be enclosed in an indestructible cage of magical crystal (20-foot cube). The cage blocks all forms of movement, teleportation, and planar travel. A creature trapped inside cannot be targeted by attacks or effects from outside the cage. The cage has no effect on creatures that are ethereal or incorporeal. On a successful save, the target is instead briefly crystallized and unable to take reactions until the end of its next turn.

name: Ash-Cloak
components: V, S, M (ash from a burned creature)
description: You wrap yourself in a swirling cloak of grey ash and shadow. For the duration, you are heavily obscured in dim light or darkness. You have resistance to fire and necrotic damage. When a creature hits you with a melee attack, the ash billows outward, forcing the attacker to make a Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 round. Additionally, you can use a bonus action to teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see, leaving behind a cloud of ash that lightly obscures a 10-foot radius until the start of your next turn.

name: Bone-Shield
components: V, S, M (a piece of bone)
description: Skeletal plates of bone erupt from your body, forming a protective shield. You gain 10 temporary hit points. While the shield is active, when a creature you can see hits you with a melee attack, the attacker takes 1d8 piercing damage from shattering bone spikes. As a bonus action on your turn, you can expend 5 temporary hit points from this shield to cause a burst of bone shards in a 15-foot cone; each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d8 piercing damage.

name: Void-Shroud
components: V, S, M (a fragment of obsidian from the Plane of Shadow)
description: You shroud yourself in a mantle of absolute darkness and silence. You become invisible and immune to all forms of divination and scrying. You gain resistance to all damage except psychic. While shrouded, you have a flying speed of 30 feet and can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain, but you take 1d10 force damage if you end your turn inside an object. When the spell ends, you explode in a burst of void energy, forcing all creatures within 20 feet to make a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away and knocked prone.

name: Crown-Protection
components: V, S, M (a circlet of gold worth at least 500 gp)
description: You place a shimmering, invisible crown upon the head of a willing creature. For the duration, the target is immune to being frightened or charmed. Additionally, once before the spell ends, when the target would take damage, the crown absorbs up to 50 points of damage and then shatters, ending the spell. The target also gains a +3 bonus to its AC for the duration.

name: Purify-Curse
components: V, S, M (a vial of holy water and a sprig of vervain)
description: You channel purifying light through a creature you touch, removing one curse, one disease, or one madness effect afflicting it. If the effect is caused by a cursed item, the item is disenchanted and becomes nonmagical (or simply mundane if it was already magical). This spell also ends the effect of the Bestow Curse spell and similar magical afflictions. If the target is under the effect of a lycanthropic curse, the curse is removed permanently.

name: Mend-Soul
components: V, S, M (a diamond worth at least 1,000 gp, which is consumed)
description: You touch a creature that has been dead for no longer than 10 days, or a creature that has suffered a permanent reduction to its maximum hit points (such as from a shadow’s Strength drain or a vampire’s bite). If the creature is dead, it is restored to life with all its hit points, and any missing body parts are regrown. If the creature is alive, its maximum hit points are fully restored, and it regains all hit points. This spell ends any effect that prevents the target from being resurrected, such as the Soul Cage or Magic Jar spells.

name: Sanctuary-Flame
components: V, S, M (a wick from a candle blessed by a cleric)
description: You ignite a ring of golden, warding flames around you. The flames shed bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. Any creature you designate (up to 5 creatures of your choice) that starts its turn inside the bright light regains 1d4 hit points. Any hostile creature that enters the bright light for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 1d6 fire damage on a failed save. You can use a bonus action on your turn to move the fire's center up to 20 feet.
